title: Add support for 'podman pod' on FreeBSD
body:
This one is fairly straightforward, mainly moving cgroup management out of the common code.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
/lgtm
/approve

Today I discovered `SavePod()` exists, when it really ought not to - that functionality should not be externally exposed. I'll fix that in a separate PR once this merges.
